prompt_text:
### Demographics: 52-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 13 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: Occasional fatigue and thirst with nocturia; no DKA/HHS signs; no severe hypoglycemia; Intermittent GI discomfort (nausea/bloating)

### History
- Other conditions: Body mass index category: Normal
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Community-acquired pneumonia (resolved)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 1 (90+); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 1 years ago; 20 cigarettes/day for 15 years; ~15 pack-years); Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 68.4 kg; Height 182.7 cm; BMI 20.5 kg/m²; Blood pressure 132/67 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.9%; 9 months ago 7.4%; 6 months ago 6.9%; 3 months ago 6.4%; current 6.3%), FPG (12 months ago 210mg/dL; 9 months ago 149mg/dL; 6 months ago 164mg/dL; 3 months ago 163mg/dL; current 121mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 66.2kg; 9 months ago 67.8kg; 6 months ago 68.3kg; 3 months ago 66.2kg; current 68.4kg), Height (12 months ago 182.7cm; 9 months ago 182.7cm; 6 months ago 182.7cm; 3 months ago 182.7cm; current 182.7cm), BMI (12 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 20.0kg/m²; current 20.5kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 135mmHg; 9 months ago 133mmHg; 6 months ago 134mmHg; 3 months ago 134mmHg; current 132mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 69mmHg; 9 months ago 68mmHg; 6 months ago 69mmHg; 3 months ago 66mmHg; current 67mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 23U/L; 9 months ago 22U/L; 6 months ago 31U/L; 3 months ago 31U/L; current 26U/L), AST (12 months ago 22U/L; 9 months ago 28U/L; 6 months ago 22U/L; 3 months ago 22U/L; current 25U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.8mg/dL; current 0.8mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 98mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 102mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 98mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 101mL/min/1.73m²; current 99mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 6.2mg/g; 9 months ago 5.9mg/g; 6 months ago 8.1mg/g; 3 months ago 7.9mg/g; current 7mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 89mg/dL; 9 months ago 85mg/dL; 6 months ago 88mg/dL; 3 months ago 86mg/dL; current 87mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 52mg/dL; 9 months ago 55mg/dL; 6 months ago 56mg/dL; 3 months ago 52mg/dL; current 54mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 140mg/dL; 9 months ago 140mg/dL; 6 months ago 124mg/dL; 3 months ago 136mg/dL; current 129mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 15.0g/dL; 9 months ago 15.8g/dL; 6 months ago 15.1g/dL; 3 months ago 15.0g/dL; current 15.2g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 0.79 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has limited financial resources and prefers low-cost options (budget ≤ KRW 200,000/month).
